titles.title: Psalm 113 (From the Rising of the Sun)

authors.author: Paul S. Deming
Paul S. Deming
Vom Aufgang der Sonne (Preiset den Herrn)

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: From the rising of the sun Until it's going down, Praise to the Lord, Praise His name. Fill the morning with your joy Fill the evening with your song Praise to the Lord, Praise His name.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Praise to the One who is high Above every nation Who has raised us from the dust To reign with Him Praise to the One who is Lord Above all creation Praise to the Lord Praise His name.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: To the barren house He comes To make of it a home Praise to the Lord Praise His name To the empty heart He calls Saying come and be My own Praise to the Lord Praise His name.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Praise to the One who is high Above every nation Who has raised us from the dust To reign with Him Praise to the One who is Lord Above all creation Praise to the Lord Praise His name

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: From the rising of the sun Until it's going down.. Praise to the Lord… Praise His name…
